Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement (Notice)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Carolyn Bell, Esq. (949) 379-6250 AEGIS LAW FIRM, PC for Plaintiff.
Matthew Mardesich, Esq. 415-433-1940 for Defendant Trego/Dugan Aviation of Grand Island Inc.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. No one opposed and no one objected to the motion.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF TATTIANA WILLIAMS' Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Motion is granted. Parties advise the Court no further hearing is needed.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CAROLYN M. BELL, Esq. of Aegis Law Firm, PC (Tel: 949-379-6250) for plaintiffs;
Atty. MATTHEW J. MARDESICH, Esq. of Littler Mendelson P.C. (Tel: 415-433-1940) for defendant Trego/Dugan Aviation of Grand Island Inc.

HEARINGRE: PLAINTIFFS' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement" is granted.

The Final Approval Hearing shall be scheduled for March 23, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Counsel for plaintiffs are to prepare and submit a proposed order which includes the 3/23/23 hearing date in the proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
